data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Optimizes decision-making time by minimizing choices, enhancing user flow.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Designs for user interactions that require minimal movement and higher accuracy.
data.technical_spec: Large clickable areas for frequently used buttons and links.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Organizes content into chunks to improve short-term memory retention.
data.technical_spec: Grouped information architecture with clear headings.

data.title: Gestalt Principles
data.description: Applies visual hierarchy and grouping principles for effective layout.
data.technical_spec: Consistent use of alignment, spacing, and color to guide the eye.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Elements close to one another are perceived as related, aiding quick comprehension.
data.technical_spec: Proximity used in form design and navigation bar elements.
